steps.title: Recognize the definition
steps.content: The underlined portion defines convergent evolution right after the term is introduced. That definition gives readers the basic concept needed for the later discussion of shared and different genetic mechanisms.

steps.title: Reject unsupported roles
steps.content: Choice A calls the underlined text examples, but it is a definition. Choice C says it clarifies confusion in earlier studies. Choice D calls it a research method. The answer is B.
